query:
SELECT w.id, w.code, w.full_name, w.group_id, g.code as group_code, g.name as group_name, g.daily_wage, g.work_minutes, g.minute_cost, g.late_penalty_rate, g.early_leave_penalty_rate
FROM workers w
LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON g.id = w.group_id
WHERE w.id = 180104;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT w.id, w.code, w.full_name, w.group_id, g.code as group_code, g.name as group_name, g.daily_wage, g.work_minutes, g.minute_cost, g.late_penalty_rate, g.early_leave_penalty_rate
FROM workers w
LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON g.id = w.group_id
WHERE w.id = 180104;
